name: Black Pudding Croquette with Gooseberry Compote, Ireland
recipeIngredient: 22 grams Clonakilty black pudding peel, chop (8oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend the roughly chopped peeled black pudding, spring onions, red peppers, potatoes, mustard, and vinegar. Season to taste.
2. Mold the mixture into cylindrical shapes about 5 cm long, roll in flour, then egg (beaten), and finally breadcrumbs.
3. Shallow fry the croquettes in plenty of hot oil until golden brown. Drain on kitchen paper and keep warm.
4. In a separate pot, dissolve sugar in water to make syrup. Bring to a boil, then add gooseberries and cook gently for 10 minutes until soft.
5. Strain off excess juice and arrange the warm compote on heated serving plates with the reserved croquettes and a small salad garnish.
